get.summary:
ListCalcJobs returns a paginated list of calc jobs with optional filters.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.view.

parameters.name: calculationType
parameters.description:
Optional calculation type filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CALCULATION_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_ACTUAL: Actual cost based on realized RM rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_FORECAST: Forecast cost using forward-looking rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_SELLING: Selling-side cost projection.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Optional status filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_QUEUED: Job created, waiting for planner.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PLANNING: Planner is expanding products + chunks.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PROCESSING: Chunks dispatched, workers running.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products calculated successfully.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products failed, others succeeded.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_FAILED: Job failed at planning or all chunks failed.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_CANCELLED: Operator cancelled the job.

post.summary:
TriggerCalcJob creates a new calc job batch.
Scope determines whether it covers a single product, a route, a filtered
set, or ALL products. Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.trigger.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: TriggerCalcJobRequest creates a new calc job batch.

get.summary:
GetCalcJob fetches one calc job by id.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.view.

post.summary:
CancelCalcJob cancels a running calc job.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.cancel.

get.summary:
ListCalcJobChunks returns chunks belonging to one job.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.view.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Optional chunk status filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CHUNK_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_QUEUED: Chunk queued, not yet dispatched.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_DISPATCHED: Chunk dispatched to a worker.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PROCESSING: Worker is processing the chunk.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products in chunk succeeded.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products in chunk failed.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_FAILED: All products in chunk failed.

get.summary:
ListCalcJobProducts returns per-product execution rows for one job.
Required permission: finance.cost.caljob.view.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Optional product status filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_PENDING: Awaiting upstream waves to finish.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_READY: Inputs ready, awaiting worker.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_CALCULATING: Worker calculating now.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SUCCESS: Cost calculated successfully.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_FAILED: Calculation failed for this product.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_BLOCKED: Blocked by upstream failure or missing inputs.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SKIPPED: Skipped (e.g., no active route).

get.summary:
ListCostResults lists active cost results across products for a period.
Required permission: finance.cost.result.view.

parameters.name: period
parameters.description: Period in YYYYMM (empty = latest period present in cst_product_cost).

parameters.name: calculationType
parameters.description:
Calculation type filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CALCULATION_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_ACTUAL: Actual cost based on realized RM rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_FORECAST: Forecast cost using forward-looking rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_SELLING: Selling-side cost projection.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description:
Result status filter (UNSPECIFIED = active only, i.e. exclude SUPERSEDED).

 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_CALCULATED: Freshly calculated, awaiting review.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_VERIFIED: Verified by a reviewer.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_APPROVED: Approved for downstream use.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_SUPERSEDED: Replaced by a newer version.

post.summary:
ApproveCostResult marks a cost result as approved.
Required permission: finance.cost.result.approve.

VerifyCostResult marks a cost result as verified.
Required permission: finance.cost.result.verify.

get.summary:
ListCostHistory returns versioned cost history (incl. superseded) for a product.
Required permission: finance.cost.history.view.

parameters.name: calculationType
parameters.description:
Optional calculation type filter (UNSPECIFIED = no filter).

 - CALCULATION_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_ACTUAL: Actual cost based on realized RM rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_FORECAST: Forecast cost using forward-looking rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_SELLING: Selling-side cost projection.

get.summary:
GetCostResult returns the active cost result for a product/period/type.
Required permission: finance.cost.result.view.

GetCostBreakdown returns by-level + rm-details + formula-trace for a cost.
Required permission: finance.cost.result.view.

CostCalcServiceApproveCostResultBody.description: ApproveCostResultRequest marks a cost result as approved.

reason.description: Optional human reason for the cancellation.

CostCalcServiceVerifyCostResultBody.description: VerifyCostResultRequest marks a cost result as verified.

v1ApproveCostResultResponse.description: ApproveCostResultResponse returns the approved cost result.

validationErrors.description: List of validation errors if any.

isSuccess.description: Indicates if the operation was successful.

v1BaseResponse.description: BaseResponse is the standard response wrapper for all API responses.

scope.description: Scope of products this job covers.

productFilterJson.description: Raw JSON of cj_product_filter (filter criteria when scope=FILTERED).

priority.description: Higher value = higher priority for dispatcher.

totalProducts.description: Total products targeted by this job.

errorSummaryJson.description: Raw JSON summarizing errors (top error categories + counts).

createdBy.description: User who triggered the job (resolved label, not UUID).

v1CalJob.description: CalJob represents a calculation job batch.

chunkNumber.description: Sequential chunk number within the job.

waveNo.description: Wave (dependency level) this chunk belongs to.

productIds.description: Product ids contained in this chunk.

productCount.description: Count of products in this chunk.

workerId.description: Worker pod/id that picked up the chunk.

maxRetries.description: Max retries allowed before giving up.

v1CalJobChunk.description: CalJobChunk is one batch of products dispatched to a worker.

chunkId.description: Chunk this product was assigned to.

productCode.description: Resolved product code (NEVER expose UUID — see UX rule).

routeHeadId.description: Route head used for this calculation.

calculationLogJson.description: Raw JSON calculation log (formula trace + intermediate values).

v1CalJobProduct.description: CalJobProduct is per-product execution row inside a job.

v1CalcJobScope.description:
CalcJobScope describes what set of products the job covers.

 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for trigger.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_ALL: All eligible products for the period.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_FILTERED: Subset selected by product_filter_json.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_SINGLE_PRODUCT: A single product target.
 - CALC_JOB_SCOPE_SINGLE_ROUTE: A single route head target.

v1CalcJobStatus.description:
CalcJobStatus is the lifecycle status of a calc job batch.

 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_QUEUED: Job created, waiting for planner.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PLANNING: Planner is expanding products + chunks.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PROCESSING: Chunks dispatched, workers running.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products calculated successfully.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products failed, others succeeded.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_FAILED: Job failed at planning or all chunks failed.
 - CALC_JOB_STATUS_CANCELLED: Operator cancelled the job.

v1CalculationType.description:
CalculationType selects the costing flavor for a job/result.

 - CALCULATION_TYPE_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update; ignored as filter.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_ACTUAL: Actual cost based on realized RM rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_FORECAST: Forecast cost using forward-looking rates.
 - CALCULATION_TYPE_SELLING: Selling-side cost projection.

v1ChunkStatus.description:
ChunkStatus is the lifecycle status of an individual chunk.

 - CHUNK_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_QUEUED: Chunk queued, not yet dispatched.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_DISPATCHED: Chunk dispatched to a worker.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PROCESSING: Worker is processing the chunk.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_SUCCESS: All products in chunk succeeded.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_PARTIAL_FAILED: Some products in chunk failed.
 - CHUNK_STATUS_FAILED: All products in chunk failed.

paramSnapshot.description: Snapshot of parameters used (key = param_code, val = stringified float).

v1CostBreakdown.description: CostBreakdown is the full drill-down for one CostResult.

costId.description: Cost id of this history entry.

variancePctFromPrevious.description: Variance percentage vs the previous version (sign included, stringified).

jobId.description: Job id that produced this row.

calculatedBy.description: User who triggered the calc (resolved label).

v1CostHistoryEntry.description: CostHistoryEntry is one row in the versioned cost history.

refCode.description: Reference code: product_code for PRODUCT, item_code for ITEM, group_code for GROUP.

refLabel.description: Resolved display label for the ref.

v1CostRMDetail.description: CostRMDetail is one RM input edge contribution to the cost.

routeHeadId.description: Route head used for the calculation.

costPerUnit.description: Cost per unit (NUMERIC(20,6) serialized as string).

totalRmCost.description: Aggregate RM cost for this product (sum of unit × ratio across stages).

jobId.description: Job id that produced this row.

calculatedBy.description: User who triggered the calc (resolved label).

v1CostResult.description: CostResult is the persisted cost summary for a product/period/type.

v1CostResultStatus.description:
CostResultStatus is the lifecycle status of a stored cost result.

 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_CALCULATED: Freshly calculated, awaiting review.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_VERIFIED: Verified by a reviewer.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_APPROVED: Approved for downstream use.
 - COST_RESULT_STATUS_SUPERSEDED: Replaced by a newer version.

outputParamCode.description: Output parameter code this formula assigns.

v1FormulaEval.description: FormulaEval traces one formula evaluation step.

breakdown.description: Full breakdown: summary + by-level + rm details + formula trace.

v1GetCostResultResponse.description: GetCostResultResponse returns the requested cost result.

v1JobProductStatus.description:
JobProductStatus is the per-product execution status inside a job.

 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_UNSPECIFIED: Default - invalid for create/update.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_PENDING: Awaiting upstream waves to finish.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_READY: Inputs ready, awaiting worker.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_CALCULATING: Worker calculating now.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SUCCESS: Cost calculated successfully.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_FAILED: Calculation failed for this product.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_BLOCKED: Blocked by upstream failure or missing inputs.
 - JOB_PRODUCT_STATUS_SKIPPED: Skipped (e.g., no active route).

productSysId.description: Product sys id at this level.

ratio.description: Ratio of this level to total cost.

v1LevelBreakdown.description: LevelBreakdown is the cost contribution at one route level.

v1ListCalcJobChunksResponse.description: ListCalcJobChunksResponse returns a page of chunks.

v1ListCalcJobProductsResponse.description: ListCalcJobProductsResponse returns a page of product-level execution rows.

v1ListCalcJobsResponse.description: ListCalcJobsResponse returns a page of jobs.

v1ListCostHistoryResponse.description: ListCostHistoryResponse returns a page of cost history rows.

items.description: Page of cost result rows (resolved product code/name/uom; no UUIDs).

resolvedPeriod.description: The period actually used (resolved when request period was empty).

v1ListCostResultsResponse.description: ListCostResultsResponse returns a page of cost results across products.

v1PaginationRequest.description: PaginationRequest contains pagination parameters for list requests.

totalItems.description: Total number of items across all pages.

v1PaginationResponse.description: PaginationResponse contains pagination metadata for list responses.

productSysId.description: For SINGLE_PRODUCT, set product_sys_id. Otherwise leave 0.

routeHeadId.description: For SINGLE_ROUTE, set route_head_id. Otherwise leave 0.

productTypeIdFilter.description: For FILTERED, set product_type_id_filter. Otherwise leave 0.

v1TriggerCalcJobRequest.description: TriggerCalcJobRequest creates a new calc job batch.

field.description: The field name that failed validation.

v1ValidationError.description: ValidationError represents a single field validation error.

v1VerifyCostResultResponse.description: VerifyCostResultResponse returns the verified cost result.
